Authors and Citation

Citation

Source: inst/CITATION

Mansoori S, Pandey S, Rani R, Singh B, Kurt M (2025). Deriving Cancer Progression Rates After Local/Regional Recurrence Using Aggregate Survival Data: An R Package for Health Economic Evaluations. Value in Health (submitted). URL: https://github.com/pharmacoevidence/seerSurv

@Article{,
  title = {Deriving Cancer Progression Rates After Local/Regional Recurrence Using Aggregate Survival Data: An R Package for Health Economic Evaluations},
